subject: Fermi GBM trigger 150106207 is not a GRB
body:
O.J. Roberts (UCD) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger
442213126 / 150106207 at 04:58:43.25 UT on the 6th
of January 2014, tentatively classified as a GRB, is
in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local
particles."
